hero.sub:
AI-curated medical literature briefings for busy clinicians.
Catch up on journal trends during your commute.
hero.note: No credit card required · Free usage every month

items.label: of clinicians read only the abstract
items.source: Baudoin et al., Ann Intern Med 1999

items.label: listen to medical audio during commute or exercise
items.source: Barton et al., Anat Sci Educ 2025

items.label: new papers added to PubMed every year

steps.title: Choose your specialty & journals
steps.desc: Select your specialty and get top journals recommended automatically. Search and add any journal by name.

steps.title: AI analyzes the trends
steps.desc: Open any issue and get an instant AI briefing — key themes, top papers, and what matters for your practice.

steps.title: Listen on your commute
steps.desc: Turn summaries into audio narration. Build a playlist and listen to multiple papers back-to-back on the go.

features.label: Features
features.title: A new way to stay current

items.title: Issue Explorer
items.desc: Select any journal issue to see AI-generated trend analysis, top 5 papers, and the complete paper list.

items.title: Trend Briefings
items.desc: Quarterly and annual trend analysis written like an editor's note. With an 8-minute audio briefing.

items.title: Topic Search
items.desc: Filter within a journal by topic — spasticity, gait, FIM, CIMT — to find relevant papers instantly.

items.title: Full-text OA Summaries
items.desc: For open-access papers, we fetch the full text via Unpaywall and PMC for deeper, more accurate summaries.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Try it first, pay when it clicks

plans.name: BYOK
items: Use your own Gemini / ElevenLabs API key
Typically a few cents/month in API costs

auth.syncHint: Your specialty and journal preferences sync across devices.

trend.title: 📈 This quarter's trends
trend.loadingHint: First analysis takes 5–10 seconds. Cached afterwards.

journals.emptyDesc: Pick a specialty and favorite (⭐) journals to see new issues at a glance.
journals.title: 📬 My journals
journals.newIssueTitle: Haven't viewed recently or first-time — a new issue may have been published

usage.exhausted: You've used up your {label} quota this month.
usage.running: You're close to your {label} quota this month.
usage.upgradeHint: Upgrade to Balanced (KRW 4,900/mo), Pro (KRW 9,900/mo), or BYOK (KRW 19,900 lifetime) to remove limits.

sort.citationsHint: Re-sort current page by citation count

detail.listenHint: Converted tracks are added quietly to the library (no auto-play).

fulltextView.preprintWarn: ⚠ This is a preprint (pre-peer-review) version — may differ from the final published article.
fulltextView.previewHint: (Preview above — summary/TTS uses the full text)

pdf.title: Couldn't auto-retrieve full text. If you have the PDF, upload it here.
pdf.hint: Uploaded PDFs are not stored on the server (text extracted only).

tts.doneToast: 🎉 Added to your library — find it in the header library
tts.runningHint: Narration + voice synthesis takes about 30–90 seconds. You can keep browsing during conversion.
tts.queuedHint: We'll automatically convert this one after the current job finishes.

ttsQueue.panelHint: Click an item to open its detail panel. Conversion continues in the background.

player.scriptShow: Show the narration script for the current track
player.scriptUnavailable: No script saved for this track (converted before v2.0.1)

journalIndex.metaDescription: Specialty-based journal curation — issues, topics, trends
journalIndex.headline: Pick a specialty
journalIndex.subline: Top journals per specialty — issues, topics, and recent trends in one place.

journalSpecialty.metaDescription: {name} ({nameEn}) top journals — catalog seed + OpenAlex auto-recommend
journalSpecialty.intro: Catalog seed + OpenAlex auto-recommend — top {n}. Click ✕ on a card to hide it in this specialty; the slot is auto-refilled with the next candidate.
journalSpecialty.fetchFailed: Couldn't fetch journal recommendations. The OpenAlex API may be temporarily unavailable or the field ID mapping may be empty.

account.featureOff: Account features are gradually rolling out (NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_AUTH=0).
account.needSignIn: Sign in via the top-right menu to view account info.
account.title: Account
account.cancelledHint: Pro access until {date}. Then converts to Free.
account.suspendedHint: Auto-payment failed. Please register a new card on the billing page.
account.byokLifetimeNote: BYOK lifetime — no renewal or cancellation needed.
account.freeResetHint1: Resets automatically on the 1st of each month at KST midnight.
account.confirmCancel: Cancel your Pro subscription? Auto-payment will stop after the next billing date and you'll switch to Free.

billing.title: Upgrade
billing.intro: Bypass the free quota and use journal curation, TTS, and full-text summaries freely.
byokFeatures: ✓ Unlimited calls with your own API key
✓ Free choice of TTS provider (Clova included)
proFeatures: ✓ Use our server keys — no setup
billing.termsPrefix: By paying, you agree to our
billing.successByokBody: BYOK lifetime access activated. All quotas are now removed.
billing.successProActivating: Activating subscription (registering card + first month payment)…
billing.successWait: Don't close this window. This may take ~5 seconds.
billing.successErrorTitle: There was a problem processing your payment
billing.successErrorBody1: Your payment may have gone through. Please contact support with the info above. (See the

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.intro: We need your phone number and consents for billing and subscription. Just once.
onboarding.phoneHint: Required for Toss Payments auto-billing. 010-XXXX-XXXX or +82 format both OK.
onboarding.privacyHint: Required — email/name/phone for billing and service operations
onboarding.thirdPartyHint: Required — phone/name/email to the payment processor for billing

settings.ttsProviderDesc: Which service to use for voice synthesis — applied from the next conversion
settings.ttsClovaLabel: Naver Clova Voice (Premium) — default for Korean
settings.ttsClovaHint: Needs NCP_CLOVA_CLIENT_ID/SECRET — best Korean voice, fast and stable
settings.ttsGeminiHint: Works with GEMINI_API_KEY — preview stage, may timeout on long narration. Auto-used when no other provider key
settings.ttsVoiceDesc: Voice + playback speed for the current provider ({provider})
settings.speedNoOpt: Gemini doesn't accept a speed option — synthesized at "Normal".
settings.autoMiniDesc: Whether to auto-fetch mini summaries for top 3 results — off means only clicked cards are summarized
settings.titleKoDesc: Korean-locale feature — switch the site to Korean to use this.
settings.titleKoHint: This setting only takes effect when the site language is Korean.
settings.notifyDesc: Show a browser notification when TTS conversion finishes
settings.aiProviderDesc: Which AI to use for natural-language search, summaries, and trend analysis — BYOK customers only
settings.apiKeysDesc: Enter your own API keys — only active after BYOK purchase. All calls run unlimited on your keys.
settings.specialtiesDesc: Specialties shown on the journal page — add/remove/reorder
settings.blocksDesc: Journals hidden via ✕ on specialty pages — can be restored
settings.backupDesc: Bundle all tracks (metadata + audio) into a single JSON file for backup/restore
settings.previewSample: Hello. This is a Paperis voice preview. Listen to the pronunciation and pace.
settings.autoMiniOn: On — top 3 auto-summarized when results arrive
settings.autoMiniOff: Off — summary only when you click a card
settings.autoMiniHint1: If you scan quickly before listening on your commute, turn it on. If you search a lot or page often, leaving it off saves Gemini response time.
settings.notifyUnsupported: This browser doesn't support the Notification API.
settings.notifyGranted: ✓ Notifications allowed — you'll get a browser notification when TTS finishes.
settings.notifyDenied: Notifications are blocked. Re-enable from the lock icon in your browser address bar.
settings.byokProvidersDesc: Choose your AI model and TTS voice (BYOK only).
settings.byokGateTitle1: Entering your own API key is only available to
settings.byokGateTitle2: . BYOK is a one-time lifetime purchase that lets you use your own keys for unlimited calls.
settings.byokGateFree: Free users get monthly quotas (trends 3 / summaries 10 / TTS 5); Balanced and Pro subscribers get unlimited use on our server keys.
settings.keyXssWarn: ⚠ Keys are stored in your browser's localStorage. Be aware of XSS risk and only use on your own browser.
settings.keyGroupAiHint: Only providers with a key entered are activated. "AI provider" picks which one to use.
settings.aiFreeLocked: Only Pro/BYOK customers can change the provider. Others use Gemini default.
settings.aiByokHint: BYOK: calls use your entered key (not the server's). Providers without a key entered + not on the server are disabled.
settings.aiProHint: Pro: calls use our server keys. Only providers registered on the server are activated.
settings.aiTtsNote: TTS voice synthesis has its own setting.
settings.backupSizeHint: Includes audio data, so file size grows with track count (typically 1–5 MB per track).

specialtyManage.gridDefaultHint: Showing default specialties. Customize in header ⚙ Settings → My specialties.
specialtyManage.gridCustomHint: Your specialties. To customize, open header ⚙ Settings → My specialties.
specialtyManage.editorDefaultHint: Showing default specialties (first {n}). Adding/removing/reordering will convert to your selection.
specialtyManage.allAdded: You've added all {n} specialties from the catalog.

blocks.empty: No blocked journals. Click ✕ on a journal card in the specialty page to hide one.

specialtyJournals.hiddenToast: Hid "{name}" in this specialty. (Settings → Blocks to restore)
specialtyJournals.hiddenNote: {n} journals hidden in this specialty — filled with next candidates.

appHome.naturalHint1: Or ask a question in natural language above.
appHome.naturalHint2: We'll translate it to a PubMed query.
appHome.oaPageSortTitle: Sort Open Access papers to the top of this page
appHome.detailPlaceholder: Click a card on the left to see details here.

search.empty: No matches. Try the English title.
search.footer: Searches the OpenAlex catalog — English journal names work best.

list.oaSortTitle: Sort Open Access papers to the top of the entire result set
list.placeholderDetail: Click a card on the left to see full text · summary · TTS.

issue.empty: No papers indexed on PubMed for {monthName} {year}.
issue.emptyHint: {journalName} may have issue cadence gaps or PubMed indexing delay.
issue.dirtyHint: Conditions changed — click Search to apply

topic.intro: Type a keyword above or click a suggested tag.
topic.emptyHint: Try a different keyword or a suggested tag.

trend.loading: Analyzing the abstract corpus as themes… takes 30–90 seconds.
trend.insufficient: Not enough papers to analyze in this period ({total}).
trend.insufficientHint: Try the annual view or a different quarter.
trend.repPmidTitle: Jump to paper card on this page (PubMed in new tab if not present)
trend.papersIntro: Below are the analyzed papers — click any card to open full text · summary · TTS.
trend.noPatterns: Not enough patterns to extract themes in this period.
trend.dirtyHint: Conditions changed — click Analyze to apply

library.emptyHint: Pick a paper and click "TTS → Library" to add one.
library.confirmDelete:
Delete this track from the library?

{title}
library.confirmClearAll:
Delete all tracks in the library ({count})?
Audio files will be removed and this cannot be undone.
library.audioMissing: Couldn't load the audio file for this track.
library.playTitle: Click to play from here (pauses if already playing)
library.scriptUnavailableTitle: No script saved for this track (converted before v2.0.1)
library.openPaperTitle: Open this paper's search detail panel
library.footer: Audio files are stored in your browser's IndexedDB only — never uploaded. They don't sync across devices. Deleting a track also removes its audio file.
